90:12339.name: PuppyLand is an AR application designed for HoloLens2. It aimed to help dog owners to interact with their dogs after the dogs passed away. Our team realized the motions of a dog to walk and sit in HoloLens by coding in Unity. The goal is to provide dog owner a digital version of the dog with the same outlook and personality.
90:12339.characters:
PuppyLand is an AR application designed for HoloLens2. 
It aimed to helpdog owners to interact with their dogs after the dogs passed away. Ourteam realized the motions of a dog to walk and sit in HoloLens by codingin Unity. The goal isto provide dog owner a digital version of the dog with the same outlookand personality.
